gateway_debug.raw_snippet: {"id":"96292493","results":[{"publishedDate":"unknown","text":"The Framework aims to simplify and clarify our approach. lt provides an overview of how HSBC identifies, evaluates and manages risks related to the delivery of our sustainability approach and is supported by internal policies and procedures. It helps define our risk appetite in sectors, or to clients or activities, which may pose heightened risks in relation to critical themes such as climate change, nature and human rights, and forms part of our broader risk management framework.
